task_completion.description: Verify that process lists are configured for all 4 input channels under the 'pvbms' node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Inputs page, the channels (solar_w, battery_soc, battery_charge_w, battery_discharge_w) under the 'pvbms' node should have a process list configured, indicated by a wrench icon or a process count greater than 0.

task_completion.description: Verify that feeds have been created for the input channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Feeds page, there should be multiple feeds listed corresponding to the solar and battery metrics.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Power-to-kWh energy accumulation feed is created for the solar generation channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Feeds page or within the solar_w input process list, there should be a feed or process explicitly indicating 'Power to kWh' or cumulative energy (kWh) for the solar generation.

task_completion.description: Verify that a dashboard named 'Solar Storage Monitor' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Dashboards list page or in the dashboard view, the title 'Solar Storage Monitor' should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Solar Storage Monitor' dashboard contains at least 4 widgets displaying key metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard view should show at least 4 distinct widgets (e.g., dials, graphs, text values) displaying data such as solar power, battery SOC, charge, or discharge.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Emoncms web interface to configure the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Emoncms web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard widgets are genuine Emoncms widgets linked to feeds.
integrity.visual_evidence: The widgets on the dashboard should look like standard Emoncms visualizations (e.g., dials, real-time graphs) rather than static text or drawn images.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script or text editor to bypass the UI setup.
integrity.visual_evidence: No code editors (like VS Code) or terminal windows running setup scripts should be visible in the final configuration steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates on Emoncms at http://localhost. The node 'pvbms' has 4 synthetic input channels: solar_w (initial value 2450W), battery_soc (68%), battery_charge_w (550W), and battery_discharge_w (0W). Process 'Log to Feed' saves data to time-series feeds, and 'Power to kWh' converts instantaneous power to cumulative energy. The dashboard must be named 'Solar Storage Monitor' and contain at least 4 widgets.
